name: eSwing.golf
about: eSwing.golf is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Worthington, OH. The facility is open 365 days a year and features two state-of-the-art simulators. It offers hourly bay rentals, with pricing that varies by day and time. Each bay can accommodate up to six players. The venue is positioned as a social golfing destination suitable for all skill levels, from novices to experienced golfers, and also serves as a location for lessons, leagues, and private events. A restaurant and bar on-site provide a lounge-style atmosphere.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round access to golf regardless of weather conditions
State-of-the-art simulator technology providing real-time swing and ball-flight data
Social atmosphere with an on-site restaurant and bar perfect for groups and events
Flexible booking for a full bay accommodating up to 6 players
Availability of lessons led by a PGA Professional with 38 years of industry experience

food_and_drink.notes: Restaurant and bar on-site, suitable for groups and events.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site restaurant and bar, so outside food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not explicitly mentioned, but bay rentals are sold by the hour, so the duration depends on the pace of play.

faq.question: Is eSwing kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, eSwing is kid-friendly, offering lessons and leagues for junior golfers and accommodating family groups.
